title: THE ECONOMIC COST OF SOCIAL ISOLATION AND LONELINESS
author: YUKSEL, U. Furkan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This chapter provides an overview on the economic costs of social isolation and loneliness. Both social isolation and loneliness are growing concerns.
steps_raw: This chapter provides an overview on the economic costs of social isolation and loneliness. Both social isolation and loneliness are growing concerns.
